description_long: This is a modern entertainment cabinet made primarily of light-colored wood, featuring a large vertical back panel and a wide, rectangular base with a central open shelf. Mounted on the front is a flat-screen television, which is supported by a sleek, metallic stand. To the right of the back panel, two floating wooden shelves extend outward, providing additional display or storage space. The cabinet's design is minimalist, with clean lines and a smooth, matte finish that highlights the natural wood grain. The base appears solid and sturdy, likely containing internal compartments or drawers, though no handles or doors are visible. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, making it suitable for urban living rooms, lounges, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern wooden entertainment cabinet with a mounted flat-screen TV, floating shelves, and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the TV mounted on the wooden panel, two floating shelves on the right, and the wide base with an open central shelf.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the TV, the depth of the cabinet base, and the protruding floating shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wooden back panel and the solid base, with floating shelves visible on the left edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the TV's thin profile and the depth of the cabinet, with floating shelves extending outward.
